meta.name: Joseph Ribkoff Inspection Report Review – Rules Reference

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection site address — report header / Factory Review checklist — Verify the full factory address is written in English and includes street, building, floor, city, province/state, country, and postal code. Address must not contain Chinese characters.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the address field only
fail_if: Address shown as "广东省汕头市科技东路11号" with no postal code

Report does not satisfy: Verify the full factory address is written in English and includes street, building, floor, city, province/state, country, and postal code. Address must not contain Chinese characters.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the address field only

pass: "Floor 5, LongSheng Building, No.11, Keji East Rd., H&N Development, Shantou, GuangDong, China. Zip code: 515041"
fail: Address shown as "广东省汕头市科技东路11号" with no postal code

checkpoints.requirement: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm the on-site factory address matches the address recorded in the booking. If they differ, a clear remark must be added to the Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check factory address against booking details
focus_terms: booking. if they differ, a clear remark must be added to the inspector's remark / other remarks
fail_if: Inspector marks "Yes" with no remark, but the on-site address differs from the booked address

Report does not satisfy: Confirm the on-site factory address matches the address recorded in the booking. If they differ, a clear remark must be added to the Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks section.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check factory address against booking details

pass: Inspector marks "No" and adds: "Factory located at [actual address]; booking recorded [booked address]"
fail: Inspector marks "Yes" with no remark, but the on-site address differs from the booked address

checkpoints.requirement: Inspector's Remark — report header summary — Verify that a complete list of all defects found is provided, broken down by PO number, with a structured format: "PO xxx: X pcs defect found / Total: X% defect found." If large quantities of defective units are found in the bulk, this must be clearly explained at the beginning of this section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check defect list in remarks against defect details in the Workmanship section
focus_terms: defect list in remarks against defect details in the workmanship
bulk, this must be clearly explained at the beginning of this
fail_if: Remarks section states only "3 defects found" with no PO breakdown and no percentage

Report does not satisfy: Verify that a complete list of all defects found is provided, broken down by PO number, with a structured format: "PO xxx: X pcs defect found / Total: X% defect found." If large quantities of defective units are found in the bulk, this must be clearly explained at the beginning of this section.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check defect list in remarks against defect details in the Workmanship section

pass: "PO 081901: 3 defects found (1 MAJ Untrimmed Thread Ends, 2 MIN Untrimmed thread ends <1/4"). Total: 6.00% defect found (3/50)"
fail: Remarks section states only "3 defects found" with no PO breakdown and no percentage

checkpoints.requirement: Available Quantity Check — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify production status thresholds are met before proceeding with inspection. For PSI: finished quantity must be 100% AND packed quantity must be ≥ 80% to proceed. For DUPRO: both finished and packed quantities must be > 20% to proceed. If thresholds are not met, inform Quality and issue a missing inspection report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the quantity fields in the Available Quantity Check section
fail_if: PSI inspection proceeded with packed quantity at 65% without any remark or Quality notification
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the quantity fields in the Available Quantity Check section
checkpoints.lookup_table:
| Service | Finished % required | Packed % required | Action if met | Action if not met |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| PSI | 100% | ≥ 80% | Proceed inspection | Packed < 80%: inform Quality; issue missing inspection report |
| DUPRO | > 20% | > 20% | Proceed inspection | Inform Quality; issue missing inspection report |

pass: PSI with 516 pcs packed (103%) out of 500 ordered — threshold met, inspection proceeds
fail: PSI inspection proceeded with packed quantity at 65% without any remark or Quality notification

checkpoints.requirement: Available Quantity Details table — Quantity & Packaging checklist — Verify that any discrepancy between the booking quantity and the on-site quantity (shortage or overage) is clearly noted in the report with an explanation.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check ordered quantity against produced and packed quantities
fail_if: 516 pcs on site vs. 500 pcs booked, with no mention of the 16-unit overage anywhere in the report
Report does not satisfy: Verify that any discrepancy between the booking quantity and the on-site quantity (shortage or overage) is clearly noted in the report with an explanation.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check ordered quantity against produced and packed quantities

pass: "Total 516 pcs / 103% packed in cartons. Overage of 16 pcs vs. booking of 500 pcs."
fail: 516 pcs on site vs. 500 pcs booked, with no mention of the 16-unit overage anywhere in the report

checkpoints.requirement: Summary review — end of report — For any "No" response recorded anywhere in the Inspection Details fields, a corresponding explanation must be present in the Summary Review section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check all "No" responses throughout the report against the Summary Review section
focus_terms: all "no" responses throughout the report against the summary review
inspection details fields, a corresponding explanation must be present in the summary review
fail_if: Tools calibration answered "No" with no corresponding explanation in the Summary Review
Report does not satisfy: For any "No" response recorded anywhere in the Inspection Details fields, a corresponding explanation must be present in the Summary Review section.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check all "No" responses throughout the report against the Summary Review section

pass: Summary Review states: "Tools calibration: No — no calibration label on the weight scale provided by factory"
fail: Tools calibration answered "No" with no corresponding explanation in the Summary Review

checkpoints.requirement: PO ref and SKU — report header, care label, hangtag, carton marking — Confirm that the style number and PO number on the on-site product identification (care label header, barcode hangtag, shipping carton) exactly match the booking information. If they do not match, the service must be treated as failed, a missed inspection report issued, and the reason clearly stated.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking style number and PO number against care label, hangtag, and carton markings
focus_terms: report header, care label, hangtag, carton marking
fail_if: Booking references style 261938; measurement chart and report header show 261838

Report does not satisfy: Confirm that the style number and PO number on the on-site product identification (care label header, barcode hangtag, shipping carton) exactly match the booking information. If they do not match, the service must be treated as failed, a missed inspection report issued, and the reason clearly stated.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking style number and PO number against care label, hangtag, and carton markings

pass: Booking style 261740 matches the SKU on the care label header, the barcode hangtag, and the carton marking
fail: Booking references style 261938; measurement chart and report header show 261838

checkpoints.requirement: Color code / description — General Information and product identification labels — If the color code or description on site does not match the booking, proceed with the inspection. Record the actual color(s) and quantity breakdown in the report with a remark identifying the discrepancy.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking color information against on-site labels and hangtags
focus_terms: General Information and product identification labels
md_sections: General Information and product identification labels
fail_if: Booking states "Midnight Blue"; on-site product shows "Navy" with no remark

Report does not satisfy: If the color code or description on site does not match the booking, proceed with the inspection. Record the actual color(s) and quantity breakdown in the report with a remark identifying the discrepancy.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking color information against on-site labels and hangtags
never_flag_if: the color code or description on site does not match the booking is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Inspector proceeds and notes: "Color description on site is Navy 2166; booking reference is Midnight Blue. Quantities: [breakdown]."
fail: Booking states "Midnight Blue"; on-site product shows "Navy" with no remark

checkpoints.requirement: Lot number — hangtag vs. carton marking — Verify that the lot number on the hangtag matches the lot number on the shipping carton. If they do not match, mark this as Failed and add a remark.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check lot number across hangtag and carton within the Specifications section
focus_terms: lot number across hangtag and carton within the specifications
fail_if: Hangtag shows Lot 081901; carton marking shows Lot 082001 — no remark provided
Report does not satisfy: Verify that the lot number on the hangtag matches the lot number on the shipping carton. If they do not match, mark this as Failed and add a remark.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check lot number across hangtag and carton within the Specifications section

pass: Hangtag and carton both show Lot 081901; result recorded as conforming
fail: Hangtag shows Lot 081901; carton marking shows Lot 082001 — no remark provided

checkpoints.requirement: Are the QIMA documents signed? — Factory Review checklist — Confirm that the Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC are all signed by both the inspector and the factory representative. Photos of all signed documents must be included in the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the signed documents field and verify photos are present
fail_if: All 3 documents are listed as signed but no photos of the signed documents are uploaded

Report does not satisfy: Confirm that the Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC are all signed by both the inspector and the factory representative. Photos of all signed documents must be included in the report.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the signed documents field and verify photos are present

pass: 3 signed document photos uploaded, each captioned (e.g., "Factory Disclaimer — signed by inspector and factory representative")
fail: All 3 documents are listed as signed but no photos of the signed documents are uploaded

checkpoints.requirement: Random carton selection — Product Specifications checklist — Confirm that cartons were selected fully randomly. If random selection was not possible, the result must be marked as Failed.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the random carton selection result field
fail_if: Inspector selects cartons all from the same pallet and marks the result as Pass
Report does not satisfy: Confirm that cartons were selected fully randomly. If random selection was not possible, the result must be marked as Failed.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the random carton selection result field

pass: Cartons selected randomly across the warehouse; result marked Pass with selected carton numbers listed
fail: Inspector selects cartons all from the same pallet and marks the result as Pass

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist — Verify the carton side reads "Made in China / Fabrique en Chine." If the wording is incorrect (e.g., "Fait en Chine"), record a MINOR defect remark but do not fail this section. Misspellings of color and country of origin on the carton are also MINOR defects requiring a remark but not a failure.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the outer packing field and any associated remarks
fail_if: Carton reads "Fait en Chine" and the inspector fails the Outer Packing section

Report does not satisfy: Verify the carton side reads "Made in China / Fabrique en Chine." If the wording is incorrect (e.g., "Fait en Chine"), record a MINOR defect remark but do not fail this section. Misspellings of color and country of origin on the carton are also MINOR defects requiring a remark but not a failure.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the outer packing field and any associated remarks

pass: Carton reads "Fait en Chine"; inspector records a MINOR defect remark and passes the section
fail: Carton reads "Fait en Chine" and the inspector fails the Outer Packing section

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that photos of (1) cartons stacked on pallets, (2) carton seals, and (3) labelling on the side of boxes are included in the report under the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that the 3 required photo types are present in the Specifications section
focus_terms: that the 3 required photo types are present in the specifications
fail_if: Only a photo of the carton front label is provided; no pallet photo or seal photo
Report does not satisfy: Verify that photos of (1) cartons stacked on pallets, (2) carton seals, and (3) labelling on the side of boxes are included in the report under the Specifications section.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check that the 3 required photo types are present in the Specifications section

pass: 3 photos provided: cartons on pallet, carton seal visible, side label showing lot/style/PO/size information
fail: Only a photo of the carton front label is provided; no pallet photo or seal photo

checkpoints.requirement: Inner Packing & Unit Packing — Product Specifications checklist — Verify availability of mold prevention unit (anti-mold sheet or desiccant pack) and vent hole as specified in the tech pack. All products must have anti-mold sheets or desiccant packs.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the inner packing checkpoint result and comments
fail_if: Anti-mold sheet not present; inspector marks result as Pass without remark

Report does not satisfy: Verify availability of mold prevention unit (anti-mold sheet or desiccant pack) and vent hole as specified in the tech pack. All products must have anti-mold sheets or desiccant packs.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the inner packing checkpoint result and comments

pass: Anti-mold sheet confirmed in each polybag; vent hole confirmed; result marked Pass
fail: Anti-mold sheet not present; inspector marks result as Pass without remark

checkpoints.requirement: Match packing info — Product Specifications checklist — Verify that the PO number, item/style number, and product description on the product identification inside the carton match the information on the corresponding export carton marking.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check inner product ID against outer carton marking
fail_if: Carton is marked PO 081901, style 261740, but the hangtag inside shows PO 082001

Report does not satisfy: Verify that the PO number, item/style number, and product description on the product identification inside the carton match the information on the corresponding export carton marking.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check inner product ID against outer carton marking

pass: All products checked confirm matching PO 081901 and style 261740 on both inner and outer identification
fail: Carton is marked PO 081901, style 261740, but the hangtag inside shows PO 082001

checkpoints.requirement: Carton drop test — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of the carton drop test must NOT be included in the report unless the test fails. Only a failure requires photos.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the photo content for the carton drop test checkpoint
focus_terms: photo content for the carton drop test
fail_if: 4 photos of cartons being dropped are uploaded even though the test passed
Report does not satisfy: Photos of the carton drop test must NOT be included in the report unless the test fails. Only a failure requires photos.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the photo content for the carton drop test checkpoint
never_flag_if: Exception condition is met: unless the test fails

pass: No photos uploaded for the carton drop test; result marked Pass with comment "PASSED"
fail: 4 photos of cartons being dropped are uploaded even though the test passed

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Photos of measuring the boxes (tape measure applied to carton sides or weight scale reading) must NOT be included in the report. Only the dimensions/weight results table and carton overview photos are required.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the photo content for this checkpoint
fail_if: 4 photos showing a tape measure placed against carton sides or a scale reading are uploaded

Report does not satisfy: Photos of measuring the boxes (tape measure applied to carton sides or weight scale reading) must NOT be included in the report. Only the dimensions/weight results table and carton overview photos are required.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the photo content for this checkpoint

pass: Only the completed assortment/dimensions/weight table and carton overview photos are present
fail: 4 photos showing a tape measure placed against carton sides or a scale reading are uploaded

checkpoints.requirement: Folding method — Inspector's Remark / Other Remarks — If the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification, record this in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section for this reason.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check folding method against tech pack and note in remarks if different
fail_if: Folding method differs from tech pack; inspector fails the Specifications section
Report does not satisfy: If the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification, record this in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section for this reason.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check folding method against tech pack and note in remarks if different
never_flag_if: the folding method on site differs from the tech pack specification is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Folding method differs from tech pack; inspector adds remark and passes the section
fail: Folding method differs from tech pack; inspector fails the Specifications section

checkpoints.requirement: Swift attaches — serial tags / Inspector's Remark — Swift attaches for serial tags must be black. If they are clear/transparent, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the swift attach color on serial tags
fail_if: Clear swift attaches found; inspector fails the Product Labels section

Report does not satisfy: Swift attaches for serial tags must be black. If they are clear/transparent, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the swift attach color on serial tags

pass: Clear swift attaches found; inspector notes "Swift attaches are clear, not black — MINOR defect" in remarks and passes the section
fail: Clear swift attaches found; inspector fails the Product Labels section

checkpoints.requirement: Joker tags — denim pants only / Inspector's Remark — For denim pants, joker tags must be sewn on with thread. If attached with black plastic swift attaches instead, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check joker tag attachment method on denim pants only
fail_if: Joker tags attached with black plastic swift attaches; inspector fails the Specifications section

Report does not satisfy: For denim pants, joker tags must be sewn on with thread. If attached with black plastic swift attaches instead, record this as a MINOR defect in the Other Remarks section. Do not fail the Specifications section.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check joker tag attachment method on denim pants only
never_flag_if: Report context does not match 'denim pants' — rule is not applicable

pass: Joker tags attached with black plastic swift attaches; inspector notes "Joker tags not sewn — MINOR defect" in remarks and passes the section
fail: Joker tags attached with black plastic swift attaches; inspector fails the Specifications section

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Verify that all hang tags and care labels are photographed together and grouped in the Product Labels section of the report. Do not scatter label photos across different sections.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check that all label types (main label, care label, hangtags) are present together in the same section
focus_terms: that all label types (main label, care label, hangtags) are present together in the same
fail_if: Care labels appear in the Workmanship section; hangtags appear only at the end of the report

Report does not satisfy: Verify that all hang tags and care labels are photographed together and grouped in the Product Labels section of the report. Do not scatter label photos across different sections.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — check that all label types (main label, care label, hangtags) are present together in the same section

pass: Main label, care labels, and all hangtag views are grouped together under Product Labels in the Specifications section
fail: Care labels appear in the Workmanship section; hangtags appear only at the end of the report

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — style number, PO, color, lot number consistency — Verify that the style number, PO number, color(s), and lot number are visible and consistent across: (1) the care and content label header (style number and PO number only), (2) the serial barcode hangtag (style number, color(s), PO number, lot number), and (3) the shipping carton marking (style number, color(s), sizes, PO number, lot number).
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check booking information against all 3 product identification components
focus_terms: style number, PO, color, lot number consistency
md_sections: style number, PO, color, lot number consistency
fail_if: The style number on the barcode hangtag reads 261838 instead of 261740

Report does not satisfy: Verify that the style number, PO number, color(s), and lot number are visible and consistent across: (1) the care and content label header (style number and PO number only), (2) the serial barcode hangtag (style number, color(s), PO number, lot number), and (3) the shipping carton marking (style number, color(s), sizes, PO number, lot number).
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check booking information against all 3 product identification components

pass: Style 261740, PO 081901, and lot number consistently appear on care label, barcode hangtag, and carton marking
fail: The style number on the barcode hangtag reads 261838 instead of 261740

checkpoints.requirement: Product Logo — Product Specifications checklist — Carefully check the physical product for the brand logo, including on sewn-on trims and interior labels. Do not mark as N/A or "no product logo" without a thorough check of all surfaces and trims.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the Product Logo result field and associated photos
fail_if: Inspector marks "No Product Logo / N/A" when the logo is present on a sewn-on trim piece

Report does not satisfy: Carefully check the physical product for the brand logo, including on sewn-on trims and interior labels. Do not mark as N/A or "no product logo" without a thorough check of all surfaces and trims.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the Product Logo result field and associated photos

pass: Inspector finds the Joseph Ribkoff logo on a sewn-on trim, marks the field correctly, and provides a photo
fail: Inspector marks "No Product Logo / N/A" when the logo is present on a sewn-on trim piece

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels — brand logo comparison vs. approval sample — If there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk, the report must be marked FAIL. Brand logo variation is a CRITICAL defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check brand logo label between approval sample and bulk
focus_terms: brand logo comparison vs. approval sample
md_sections: brand logo comparison vs. approval sample
fail_if: Logo label font on bulk slightly differs from approval sample; inspector records as Minor and passes

Report does not satisfy: If there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk, the report must be marked FAIL. Brand logo variation is a CRITICAL defect.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check brand logo label between approval sample and bulk
never_flag_if: there is any visual variation or damage to the brand logo label between the approval sample and the bulk is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Logo label visually differs from approval sample; inspector marks Product Labels as Failed — CRITICAL defect
fail: Logo label font on bulk slightly differs from approval sample; inspector records as Minor and passes

checkpoints.requirement: Size tab — Product Specifications checklist — If there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab, the report must be marked FAIL. Size tab variation is a MAJOR defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: compare bulk size tab against approval sample within the Specifications section
fail_if: Size tab color on bulk differs from approval; inspector records as Minor
Report does not satisfy: If there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab, the report must be marked FAIL. Size tab variation is a MAJOR defect.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — compare bulk size tab against approval sample within the Specifications section
never_flag_if: there is any visual variation between the approval sample size tab and the production size tab is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Size tab visually differs from approval sample; inspector marks Product Labels as Failed — MAJOR defect
fail: Size tab color on bulk differs from approval; inspector records as Minor

checkpoints.requirement: Care content label — language sequence — Misprinting or variation in the sequence of languages on care content labels compared to the approval sample is NOT a reason to fail the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the care label language sequence against approval sample
fail_if: Language order on bulk care label differs from approval; inspector fails the Product Labels section
Report does not satisfy: Misprinting or variation in the sequence of languages on care content labels compared to the approval sample is NOT a reason to fail the report.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the care label language sequence against approval sample

pass: Language order differs from approval; inspector notes this in remarks but passes the section
fail: Language order on bulk care label differs from approval; inspector fails the Product Labels section

checkpoints.requirement: Hangers — Product Specifications checklist (when applicable) — If the lot is to be shipped on hangers, verify that hangers bear the Joseph Ribkoff logo as specified in the tech pack.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check hanger specification against tech pack when shipping on hangers is required
fail_if: Products shipped on unbranded hangers when tech pack specifies Joseph Ribkoff logo hangers; no remark in report
Report does not satisfy: If the lot is to be shipped on hangers, verify that hangers bear the Joseph Ribkoff logo as specified in the tech pack.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check hanger specification against tech pack when shipping on hangers is required
never_flag_if: the lot is to be shipped on hangers is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Joseph Ribkoff logo hangers confirmed on all units; noted as conforming to tech pack
fail: Products shipped on unbranded hangers when tech pack specifies Joseph Ribkoff logo hangers; no remark in report

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Classify untrimmed thread ends by length using the photo as evidence.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to each untrimmed thread defect entry
fail_if: Photo shows a thread end approximately 1/2" long; inspector classifies it as MINOR
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to each untrimmed thread defect entry

pass: Photo shows a thread end approximately 1/2" long; inspector classifies it as MAJOR
fail: Photo shows a thread end approximately 1/2" long; inspector classifies it as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All dirt and stain defects must be classified as MAJOR, regardless of size or location.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any dirt/stain defect entry
fail_if: A stain on the front panel is classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: All dirt and stain defects must be classified as MAJOR, regardless of size or location.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any dirt/stain defect entry

pass: A stain on the front panel is classified as MAJOR
fail: A stain on the front panel is classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — All stitching defects must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any stitching defect entry
fail_if: A stitching skip on the side seam is classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: All stitching defects must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any stitching defect entry

pass: A stitching skip on the side seam is classified as MAJOR
fail: A stitching skip on the side seam is classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Yarn defects and holes must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any yarn defect or hole entry
fail_if: A small hole in the fabric is classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: Yarn defects and holes must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any yarn defect or hole entry

pass: A small hole in the fabric is classified as MAJOR
fail: A small hole in the fabric is classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Wrinkles, over-press marks, or creases visible from 1 meter away must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity of any wrinkle or press mark defect entry
fail_if: A crease visible at 1 m on the front panel is classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: Wrinkles, over-press marks, or creases visible from 1 meter away must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity of any wrinkle or press mark defect entry

pass: A crease visible at 1 m on the front panel is classified as MAJOR
fail: A crease visible at 1 m on the front panel is classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any seam with excessive puckering, poor tension, or linking that causes the seam to open must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the severity assigned to any seam quality defect entry
fail_if: A puckered seam causing partial opening classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: Any seam with excessive puckering, poor tension, or linking that causes the seam to open must be classified as MAJOR.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the severity assigned to any seam quality defect entry

pass: A puckered seam causing partial opening classified as MAJOR
fail: A puckered seam causing partial opening classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any product whose shape or form differs from the specifications or approval sample must be classified as a MAJOR workmanship defect.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check product form against approval sample and tech pack
fail_if: Product silhouette differs from approval sample; classified as MINOR
Report does not satisfy: Any product whose shape or form differs from the specifications or approval sample must be classified as a MAJOR workmanship defect.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check product form against approval sample and tech pack

pass: Product silhouette differs from approval sample; classified as MAJOR
fail: Product silhouette differs from approval sample; classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section — Any trim that is missing, not installed securely, or falling off must be classified as MAJOR. Trim placement and installation must conform to the tech pack and/or approval sample.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check trim installation against tech pack and approval sample
fail_if: A rhinestone is falling off; classified as MINOR

Report does not satisfy: Any trim that is missing, not installed securely, or falling off must be classified as MAJOR. Trim placement and installation must conform to the tech pack and/or approval sample.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check trim installation against tech pack and approval sample

pass: A rhinestone is falling off; classified as MAJOR
fail: A rhinestone is falling off; classified as MINOR

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Workmanship section / report photos — Include a maximum of 5 photos per defect type. If the same defect is found on more than 5 units, upload only 5 representative photos and document the total count in the report. For multiple references or colors, include only 1 photo per color.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the number of photos per defect entry in the Workmanship section
focus_terms: number of photos per defect entry in the workmanship
fail_if: 20 photos of untrimmed threads uploaded for a single defect entry

pass: 5 photos maximum for "Untrimmed Thread Ends," representing the variety of affected units; report states total count

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — Product Dimensions SL checklist; Attachments section — Verify that the measurement chart uses the correct Joseph Ribkoff mandatory POM template for the product category (see table below), that the style number in the chart matches the report SKU, and that the attached Excel file is named exactly "Measurement Chart - [style number]" (e.g., "Measurement Chart - 261740.xlsx").
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check SKU in chart against report header; check file name in Attachments

fail_if: File is named "Measurement chart format-joseph Ribkoff.xlsx"; style number in chart reads 261838 instead of 261740
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check SKU in chart against report header; check file name in Attachments

|---|---|---|

| Denim Jacket | 15 | POM JACKET _ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Sweater | 11 | POM KNITWEAR- SWEATERS-QIMA 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Cardigan | 12 | POM KNITWEAR- SWEATERS-QIMA 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Alpha Pull-On Pant | 10 | POM DENIM PANT _PULL ON PANT _ QIMA_ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Denim Pants | 11 | POM DENIM PANT _PULL ON PANT _ QIMA_ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Skirts 0–24 | 7 | POM SKIRT-QIMA_ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Skirts Pull-On XS–XXL | 5 | POM SKIRT-QIMA_ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Dress/Blouse | 17 | POM DRESSES -QIMA _ 2022-04-07[1].xlsx |
| Other products | Per booking attachment | Per booking attachment |

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — measurement chart (Excel attachment) / report result field — All out-of-tolerance measurements must be highlighted in yellow in the Excel file. Apply the tolerance rule as follows: if all out-of-tolerance values are within ±1/8", classify as MINOR — add a remark and do not fail the section. If any tolerance exceeds ±1/8", highlight in yellow with red text — the measurement section must be marked FAIL.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check highlighting in the attached measurement chart and the result field
focus_terms: highlighting in the attached measurement chart and the
excel file. apply the tolerance rule as follows: if all out-of-tolerance values are within ±1/8", classify as minor — add a remark and do not fail the

If any tolerance exceeds ±1/8", highlight in yellow with red text — the measurement section must be marked FAIL.
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check highlighting in the attached measurement chart and the result field

pass: The "Front HSP" cell is highlighted in yellow with red text; measurement section is marked Fail

focus_terms: header row and content of measurement chart
md_sections: header row and content of measurement chart

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — checklist photos and attachments — Measurement chart screenshots (print screen of POM) and the Excel file must both be uploaded exclusively in the Product Dimensions Result section. fail_if: 4 photos uploaded for the Adhesive test even though it passed

checkpoints.requirement: Stitch density check — Tests checklist / report photos — The stitch count per inch must be clearly stated as a numeric value in the report, with a supporting photo taken from a seam assembly — not from sewing on the main label.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the stitch density result and photo source
fail_if: Photo shows stitch density measured on the main label seam; no numeric count is stated in the comment

checkpoints.requirement: Ironing, washing, treatment check — Tests checklist / report photos — Include clear photos of both the approval sample and the bulk product side by side, each with a caption identifying which is which.

fail_if: Only a photo of the bulk garment is provided with no approval sample for comparison

checkpoints.requirement: Barcode scanning test — Tests checklist / report photos — The UPC 13 scanner must be used (not UPC 12). Upload 1 photo per barcode type present on the product. If a barcode scan result is missing a leading zero, record this as a remark but do not fail this section.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check the barcode type used, the photo count per barcode type, and the interpretation of results
focus_terms: barcode type used, the photo count per barcode type, and the interpretation of
fail_if: Inspector uses UPC 12 scanner and fails the section because a leading zero is missing; only 1 global photo uploaded despite 2 barcode types on the product

Report does not satisfy: The UPC 13 scanner must be used (not UPC 12). Upload 1 photo per barcode type present on the product. If a barcode scan result is missing a leading zero, record this as a remark but do not fail this section.

pass: Inspector uses UPC 13 scanner; 1 photo per barcode type uploaded; missing leading zero noted as remark; section passed
fail: Inspector uses UPC 12 scanner and fails the section because a leading zero is missing; only 1 global photo uploaded despite 2 barcode types on the product

checkpoints.requirement: Symmetry check — Tests checklist / report photos — A verification of the front facing must be done and must be visible in the report. Fold the product on its symmetry axis or use a measurement tool to compare. The result and a supporting photo must be present.

fail_if: Symmetry check marked Pass with no photo showing the front facing verification

checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check the symmetry check result and supporting photo

pass: Photo shows product folded on symmetry axis or front facing laid flat; result marked Pass with comment "PASSED"
fail: Symmetry check marked Pass with no photo showing the front facing verification

checkpoints.requirement: Approval Sample Comparison — Product Specifications checklist / report photos — Each approval sample comparison photo must show the on-site bulk product and the approval sample physically side by side.
